title: At Least 12 Dead After Shooting by Multiple Attackers in Johannesburg
summary_full: The police said they were looking for more than 10 attackers, who had stormed a community of tin shacks. Investigators were still trying to determine the motive.
summary_public: The police said they were looking for more than 10 attackers, who had stormed a community of tin shacks. Investigators were still trying to determine the motive.
